title: v0.30.0-rc15
reason: New Ollama RC adds specific hardware detection, directly actionable for local LLM builders.
post_text: Ollama v0.30.0-rc15 adds Windows iGPU detection for Vulkan. This could improve local LLM performance and reliability for developers running Ollama on Windows machines with integrated GPUs.
source_angle: Ollama release improves local LLM hardware compatibility
